docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARK-WIELAND, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT FEDERAL EXPRESS CORP LOUIE, BENSON DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-03-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-13-1996
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARK-WIELAND, BARBARA

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OR A SIGNED ORDER TO PUBLISH. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 1/6/97: APPEARANCE IS MANDATORY UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTIFIED. (ADDRESS IN SYSTEM WAS LISTED AS 1901 HARRISON ST, 	01, OAKLAND CA 94612 - ADDRESS CORRECTED - SEE PREVIOUS NOTICE RETURNED TO COURT) HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-29-1997, CONTINUED TO MAR-17-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
